coverage_note: lyap[N] equals f(x_N)-f(x_star)-R/(alpha*N)-(1/(alpha*N))*(D_h(x_star,x_0)-R); final rank 2 reflects the Bregman boundary term.
S_piece_code: S has zero decomposition in Block 2; no S pieces are subtracted in Block 3.
lyapunov_sign_convention: V_{k+1}-V_k is a sum of nonnegative multipliers times ConvexFunction interpolation residuals, each <= 0, so the constructed V_k sequence is nonincreasing.

basis_templates.description: Interior rank-4 geometric basis for the Bregman-distance difference.
Terminal rank-2 geometric basis after the final h(x_star, x_N) interpolation term cancels h(x_N).

block4_note: The inner-product part of V_k is exactly the Bregman-distance cross-term representation; the scalar coordinates supply the corresponding h and f values.

symbolic_identities.step_identity: V_{k+1}-V_k = 1/N I_f(x_star,x_{k+1}) + k/N I_f(x_k,x_{k+1}) + (k+1)/(alpha*N) I_h(x_{k+1},x_k) + k/(alpha*N) I_h(x_k,x_{k+1})
symbolic_identities.terminal_step_identity: V_N-V_{N-1} equals the last step residuals plus 1/(alpha*N) I_h(x_star,x_N)

inequality_direction: Each ConvexFunction interpolation residual is <= 0 and all coefficients are nonnegative for alpha>0, N>=1. The initial residual D_h(x_star,x_0)-R is <=0. Thus V_k is nonincreasing and f(x_N)-f(x_star)<=R/(alpha*N).
